kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Landing\\Desktop\\docDev\\robotClaude\\front-back\\rf_tests\\browser\\traces\\temp\\559563f2-244c-48fc-ab99-3e0bdc53d23f"}

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "width": 1280, "height": 720 } }
Successfully created context.

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': {'width': 1280, 'height': 720}}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=password at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'SuperSecretPassword!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#flash at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ' You logged into a secure area!\n×'
${msg} = You logged into a secure area! ×
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: TC_002 - Connexion avec mot de passe invalide

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=password at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'mauvaisMotDePasse' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#flash at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ' Your password is invalid!\n×'
${msg} = Your password is invalid! ×
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: TC_003 - Connexion avec nom d'utilisateur invalide

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'utilisateurInconnu' in the given field.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=password at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'SuperSecretPassword!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#flash at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ' Your username is invalid!\n×'
${msg} = Your username is invalid! ×
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: TC_004 - Deconnexion apres une connexion reussie

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=password at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'SuperSecretPassword!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#flash at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.msg: ${url} = https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ' You logged into a secure area!\n×'
${msg} = You logged into a secure area! ×
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=a[href="/logout"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=a[href="/logout"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#flash at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ' You logged out of the secure area!\n×'
${msg} = You logged out of the secure area! ×
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
